overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a racing simulation showing nighttime driving in heavy rain from inside a BMW. The driver navigates a wet multi-lane highway with active windshield wipers, overtaking vehicles and passing through tunnels and overpasses while street lights reflect off the rain-soaked asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway in heavy rain at night

events.description: ego vehicle changes lanes to the left to overtake a slower vehicle ahead
large green truck passes by on the left side at high speed

agents.ego_description: driving a BMW at highway speed with tattooed hands visible on the steering wheel, operating windshield wipers continuously to clear heavy rain

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane before being overtaken
green cargo truck passing quickly on the left side

entered.detail: rain-soaked multi-lane road surface reflecting street lights and vehicle headlights
metal highway barrier running parallel to the road on the right side
metal highway barrier separating opposing traffic on the left
tall street lamps illuminating the highway at regular intervals
illuminated instrument cluster with speedometer and central display visible inside the vehicle

segments.scene_description: Driving a BMW on a rain-soaked multi-lane highway at night with active windshield wipers. The driver overtakes a silver sedan and is passed by a green truck on the left. Street lights illuminate the wet asphalt and metal guardrails lining both sides of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing under concrete overpass with commercial buildings nearby

events.description: vehicle passes underneath a large concrete overpass structure spanning the highway

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady highway speed while navigating under the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: vehicle with red taillights visible ahead in the distance

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure with support columns spanning across the highway
brightly lit building with yellow illumination visible on the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway and passing underneath a concrete overpass. A brightly lit commercial building appears on the left side. The road remains wet with rain, and the vehicle maintains steady speed through this semi-covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway tunnel or deeply shaded underpass section with artificial lighting

events.description: entering a dark tunnel section with significantly reduced ambient light levels

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dark tunnel section with reduced visibility, maintaining steady lane position

entered.detail: dark enclosed tunnel walls with overhead artificial lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark tunnel or heavily shaded section of the highway where ambient light drops significantly. The tunnel walls enclose the road on both sides, with only artificial lights illuminating the wet road ahead. The rain continues as the car maintains speed through this enclosed section.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane highway continuing through rainy night conditions

events.description: exiting the dark tunnel section back to the open highway with regular street lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey on the open highway, overtaking other vehicles in the heavy rain

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan being overtaken on the left side

entered.detail: another concrete overpass structure visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel back to the open highway where street lights once again illuminate the rain-soaked road. The vehicle continues driving through the heavy rain, with another overpass visible in the distance ahead. The windshield wipers maintain their steady rhythm as the journey continues along the wet asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a BMW navigating a rain-soaked highway at night, transitioning from open roads through an enclosed tunnel and back into the storm. It begins with the vehicle overtaking a silver sedan while a green truck passes on the left, with street lights reflecting off the wet asphalt and metal guardrails. As the car maintains its speed, the scene shifts under a concrete overpass and past a brightly lit commercial building before the environment suddenly closes in. The camera then enters a dark, enclosed tunnel where ambient light drops significantly and only artificial fixtures illuminate the rain-slicked road. Finally, the vehicle emerges from the tunnel back into the open night air, continuing through the heavy rain toward another distant overpass as the windshield wipers maintain their steady rhythm.
